_comment: Drop the `bundle.windows` and `bundle.publisher` blocks below into your main tauri.conf.json. This file is a reference snippet, not a complete config.

windows._comment_signing: Pick ONE of the three signing approaches below.
windows._comment_a: Approach A: thumbprint of cert in CurrentUser\My. Best for self-hosted runners.
windows._comment_b: Approach B: drop the thumbprint block above, set WINDOWS_CERTIFICATE + WINDOWS_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD env vars instead.
windows._comment_c: Approach C: custom sign command (Azure Key Vault via relic, or Azure Trusted Signing). Tauri replaces %1 with each artifact.
windows._comment_webview2: Pick ONE webviewInstallMode. offlineInstaller is REQUIRED for MS Store.
windows._comment_webview2_alt: { "type": "offlineInstaller" } for MS Store / enterprise. { "type": "embedBootstrapper" } for Win7 support. { "type": "fixedRuntime", "path": "./Microsoft.WebView2.FixedVersionRuntime.x.y.z.x64/" } to pin a build.
